ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood association */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood association */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the association */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the regular meeting (if applicable) */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of the regular meeting (if applicable) */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location of the regular meeting (if applicable) */,
  "texting_keyword" TEXT /* Texting keyword for the association (if applicable) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the association */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the association's website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the association */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the association */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_associations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES association_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the association type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the association type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood association that created the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is recurring */,
  "recurring_details" TEXT /* Details of the recurrence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_events_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES neighborhood_associations ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attended the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's attendance */,
  "attended_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user attended the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES association_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the association */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's membership */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the membership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the membership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_memberships_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES neighborhood_associations ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "texting_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood association that sent the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was sent */,
  "campaign_message" TEXT /* Message sent in the campaign */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texting_campaigns_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES neighborhood_associations ("association_id")
)
